name: gsp1_still_works
left: an FTC website screen showing a red SERVICES UNAVAILABLE notice, shadowed, the dead end people are panicking about
right: a credit report with a clean green DELETED stamp and a small CFPB seal, proof it still cleared
expression: calm, knowing, a slight controlled half-smile, eyes steady on camera

name: gsp1_cfpb_4days
left: a dim FTC portal screen stamped UNAVAILABLE in red, deep shadow, the dead end
right: a clean credit result screen with ONE bold green DELETED stamp and the text 4 DAYS; absolutely no VERIFIED stamp anywhere, the outcome is DELETED
expression: confident, direct, certain, locked eye contact

asset.envato_query: government complaint portal dashboard ui mockup

name: gsp1_605b
left: a credit account stamped VERIFIED in red, shadowed, a dead end
right: the exact same account now stamped DELETED in green with a small 605B reference tag, clean and authoritative

name: gsp1_dont_wait
left: a dim phone screen showing a single government SHUTDOWN notice in soft grey, one legible word SHUTDOWN, deep shadow, no other legible text
expression: serious, no smile, quiet intensity, a slight forward lean
